CustomField.label: Service Resource
CustomField.description: The Salesforce Scheduler ServiceResource this physical bay corresponds to. Links the shot-tracking bay model (Simulator_Bay__c) to the live booking model (ServiceResource/ServiceAppointment) — previously reconciled only by a fragile bay-name string match in fairway-bay's App.tsx. One-bay-per-resource is enforced only by convention and the migration script, not by a lookup uniqueness constraint.
